title: Intense Peppery Uruguayan Beef Skewers
description: A show-off Uruguayan dish featuring tender beef, crunchy rice paper sheets, and a flavorful nimono-simmer, all served on a cedar plank.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and black pepper.
Add the beef cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated beef cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the rice paper sheets with olive oil and wrap each skewer with a sheet.
Place the skewers on the preheated cedar plank and grill for 10 minutes per side.
While the skewers are grilling, prepare the nimono-simmer by combining soy sauce, brown sugar, and garlic in a small saucepan.
Bring the nimono-simmer to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Brush the skewers with the nimono-simmer during the last minute of grilling.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
